landing.heroTitle: Lacagta soo gasha, lacagta baxda — mar walba waad arki kartaa.
landing.heroSub: Moneytracer waa aaladda buug-hayneed iyo maaliyadeed ee ganacsiyada yaryar, kooxaha kaydinta bulshada, iyo kharashka shakhsi ahaaneed. La soco iibka iyo alaabta, maarayn karti wax-ku-biirinta shirkaddaada, ama maarayn miisaaniyaddaada — dhammaan hal shabakad guud oo fudud.
landing.businessFeaturesTitle: Wax walba oo ganacsi yar u baahan yahay si uu ula socdo lacagtiisa
landing.businessFeaturesSub: Laga bilaabo miiska ilaa buuga miisaaniyadda, Moneytracer wuxuu ilaaliyaa iibkaaga, alaabtaada, iyo socodka lacagta si habaysan iyada oo aan loo baahnayn spreadsheet.
landing.communityFeaturesTitle: Loogu talagalay chama-yada, bangiga miiska, iyo hiigsiga wareegga
landing.communityFeaturesSub: Jooji la socodka wax-ku-biirinta buug. Moneytracer wuxuu siinayaa kooxdaada diiwaan la wadaago oo sax ah oo xubin walba ay ku kalsoonaan karto.
landing.personalFeaturesTitle: Ku kharash gareey xigmad, iyada oo aan loo baahnayn spreadsheet
landing.personalFeaturesSub: Gali kharash ilbiriqsiyo gudahood, arag waxa maanta ammaan u ah in la kharash geliyo, kuna dhis caadooyin fiican waqti ka dib — sidaada, ha noqoto miisaaniyad, caado, ama kaydin la wadaago saaxiibbo.

businessFeatures.title: Goobta Iibka
businessFeatures.text: Bixin degdeg ah oo alaabo badan leh oo si toos ah loo xaqiijiyo kaydka, loogu talagalay miiska.

businessFeatures.title: Alaabta Kaydka
businessFeatures.text: La soco heerarka kaydka, geli alaabta guud ahaan, oo hel digniin ka hor inta kaydku ka dhammaanayo.

businessFeatures.title: Qaansheegyada & Qiimeeyayaasha
businessFeatures.text: Dir qaansheegyo iyo qiimeeyayaal xirfad leh, oo bedel qiimeeyayaasha la aqbalay iib.

businessFeatures.title: Deynlayaasha iyo Lagu Leeyahay
businessFeatures.text: Ogow qofka deynta kugu leh iyo qofka aad deyn ku leedahay, hal fiiris ah.

businessFeatures.title: Warbixinnada
businessFeatures.text: Faa'iido iyo khasaare, kooban maaliyadeed, iyo qiimaynta alaabta — had iyo jeer waa cusub tahay.

businessFeatures.title: Diiwaanka Howlaha
businessFeatures.text: Diiwaan buuxa oo ku saabsan cidii wax samaysay, si aysan waxna u dhaafin iyada oo aan la ogayn.

communityFeatures.title: Maarayn Xubnaha
communityFeatures.text: Ku dar xubno, u qoondee diiwaan-yeelayaal wax-ka-qaybqaata, oo sii xubnaha gelitaankooda oo akhrin kaliya ah.

communityFeatures.title: Wax-ku-biirinta
communityFeatures.text: Diiwaan geli wax-ku-biirinta kaydka xubin kasta oo arag wadarta kooxda oo si toos ah loo cusboonaysiinayo.

communityFeatures.title: Bixinta
communityFeatures.text: La soco bixinta wareega ama qaybinta si caddaalad ah, oo leh taariikh buuxa xubin kasta.

communityFeatures.title: Deymaha Kooxda
communityFeatures.text: Sii xubnaha deymo kaydka kooxda ka yimid oo la soco celinta ilaa senti u dambeysa.

communityFeatures.title: Kooban Kooxda
communityFeatures.text: Hal aragti oo cad oo ku saabsan wadarta kaydka, deymaha soo hara, iyo caafimaadka kooxda — kulan kasta.

communityFeatures.title: Gelitaan Ku Salaysan Doorka
communityFeatures.text: Maamulayaasha iyo diiwaan-yeelayaashu waxay maareeyaan gelitaanka; xubnuhu had iyo jeer waxay arki karaan diiwaankooda.

personalFeatures.title: Diiwaan Kharash Degdeg ah
personalFeatures.text: Ku dar kharash ilbiriqsiyo gudahood — qadarka, qaybta, dhammaad. Ma jiraan spreadsheet, ma jiraan dhib.

personalFeatures.title: Miisaaniyadaha Xarfaha
personalFeatures.text: Deji miisaaniyad bille ah qayb kasta oo had iyo jeer ogow waxa ammaan u ah in maanta la kharash geliyo.

personalFeatures.title: Caadooyinka Kharashka
personalFeatures.text: U calaamadee kharashyada muhiim ama rabitaan lama filaan ah oo arag caadooyinkaaga oo hagaagaya toddobaad kasta.

personalFeatures.title: Yoolalka Kaydinta
personalFeatures.text: Deji yool, la soco horumarka, oo sii ahaw mid dadaal badan leh iyada oo leh xariiq muuqda oo dhammaad ah.

personalFeatures.title: Tartannada Kooxda
personalFeatures.text: Kaydso saaxiibbo la wadaag yool la wadaago, iyada oo horumarka qof kasta la arki karo.

personalFeatures.title: Aragtida Shakhsiga
personalFeatures.text: Arag halka lacagtaadu run ahaantii aado, iyo toddobaadyada ama qaybaha sii kordhaya.

landing.oneAccountTitle: Hal akoon, sidii uu ahaan lahaa waxa aad u baahan tahay
landing.oneAccountSub: Dooro akoon ganacsi, bulsho, ama shakhsi ah marka aad isdiiwaangeliso — shabakadda guud, doorarka, iyo warbixinnadu way isu habeeyaan.
landing.accountBusinessText: POS, alaab, qaansheegin, iyo warbixin dukaamada, ganacsatada, iyo ganacsiyada adeegga ee cabbir kasta.
landing.accountCommunityText: Wax-ku-biirinta, bixinta, iyo deymaha kooxda ee kooxaha kaydinta iyo goobaha maaliyadeed ee bulshada.
landing.accountPersonalText: Miisaaniyadaha, caadooyinka, iyo yoolalka kaydinta ee qof kasta oo doonaya inuu kharash gareeyo si xigmad leh, keligiis ama saaxiibbo la wadaag.
landing.aboutTitle: Loogu talagalay habka lacagtu run ahaantii u dhaqaaqdo
landing.aboutP1: Moneytracer waxa uu ka bilaabmay fikrad fudud: aaladaha caawiya milkiilaha dukaanka, xisaabiyaha kooxda kaydinta, ama qof miisaaniyeynaya mushaharkiisa uma baahna shahaado xisaabeed ama spreadsheet. Ha noqoto inaad maamusho dukaan qalab, ama aad maareyso wax-ku-biirinta bishii ee chama, ama aad kaliya isku dayayso inaad aragto halka lacagtaadu tagto, Moneytracer wuxuu ku siinayaa hal diiwaan oo cad oo daacad ah oo aad ku kalsoonaan karto.
landing.aboutP2: Waxaan ugu horeyn u dhisnay ganacsiyada iyo bulshooyinka Afrika — iyada oo leh taageero lacago badan oo qaaradda oo dhan ku baahsan, hawlo aan u baahnayn internet, iyo qiimayaal ku habboon ganacsiga yar, ma aha shirkad caalami ah. Ma jiraan erayo adag, ma jiraan astaamo aadan waligaa isticmaali doonin — waxaa jira kaliya lambarada muhiimka ah, oo had iyo jeer cusub.
landing.statDashboard: Shabakad guud oo wax walba oo aad la socoto
landing.valueSimpleTitle: Loogu talagalay in ay fudud tahay
landing.valueSimpleText: Tababar looma baahna. Haddii aad isticmaali karto taleefan, waxaad ku maamuli kartaa buugaagtaada Moneytracer laga bilaabo maalinta koowaad.
landing.valueDataText: Akoon kasta si gaar ah ayaa loo kaydiyaa oo la ammaan geliyay, oo leh diiwaan howleed oo buuxa si aad had iyo jeer u ogaato cidii wax bedeshay.
landing.valueAfricaText: Lacagaha maxaliga ah, xaaladaha maxaliga ah — waxaa loo naqshadeeyay sida ganacsiyada iyo bulshooyinka halkan run ahaantii u shaqeeyaan.
landing.pricingTitle: Ma diyaar u tahay inaad hagaajiso maaliyaddaada?
landing.pricingSub: Samee akoon daqiiqado gudahood. Spreadsheet looma baahna.
landing.betaNoticeP1: Moneytracer waa bilaash in la isticmaalo maalmaha
landing.betaNoticeP2: intii aan si firfircoon u horumarinayno. Marxaladdan waxaad arki kartaa isbeddello maalin kasta, cilado marmar ah, ama joojin gaaban marka aan soo saarno horumarinta. Waxaan ku dhawaaqi doonaa qorshayaasha qiimaha wakhti fog ka hor inta ay dhammaanayso marxaladda beta.
landing.disclaimerText: Moneytracer waxa uu hadda ku jiraa horumarin firfircoon (beta). Isticmaalka Adeegga wuxuu hoos yimaadaa Shuruudaha Isticmaalka iyo Digniinta buuxa, kuwaas oo daboolaya lumitaanka xogta, xaddidaadda dammaanadda, mas'uuliyadda, iyo xallinta khilaafaadka. Fadlan akhri shuruudaha buuxa ka hor inta aadan ku tiirsanayn Adeegga diiwaanka maaliyadeed ee ganacsiga, bulshada, ama shakhsiyeed.
landing.availableInLanguages: Waxaa lagu heli karaa luqado badan, oo ay ku jirto Af-Soomaali.
